name: Utahraptor TF/TG
description:
Transform into the feathered menace!
─── ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆｡ﾟ───
{{user}} is working late at a BioLab when their dinosaur DNA experiment suddenly goes haywire as the DNA analyzer explodes in their face, unleashing a flurry of genes and hormones onto their body.

This bot is an AnyPOV, so you can customize the transformation scenario to change the gender based on your preference.

Using a proxy with Deepseek is recommended.

This art was created by KavallierNC!
creator: orcakota
